task_completion.description: Open the 'Q2 Financial Review' event in the Odoo Calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible, and the details form or modal for the 'Q2 Financial Review' event is open.
The event description text area is visible and active/editable.

task_completion.description: Add the required agenda items to the description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field contains the text 'Revenue Analysis', 'Expense Report', and 'Forecasting'.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Send message' composer in the Odoo chatter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Send message' tab is selected in the chatter section (usually on the right side or bottom of the event form), rather than the 'Log note' tab.

task_completion.description: Draft the notification message to attendees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message composer text area contains the text 'I've added the agenda items. Please prepare your data.' (or at least 'prepare your data').

task_completion.description: Send the message as a comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message appears in the chatter history below the composer as a standard sent message, or the 'Send' button is actively being clicked under the 'Send message' tab.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Odoo 17, with standard navigation menus, chatter components, and calendar views, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots, and the chatter history shows genuine Odoo message formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Platform: Odoo 17. Target Event: 'Q2 Financial Review'. Required Agenda Items to add to description: 'Revenue Analysis', 'Expense Report', 'Forecasting'. Required Message Content: Must contain 'prepare your data' (case-insensitive). Message Type: Must be a 'comment' (sent via the 'Send message' tab in Odoo chatter to notify attendees), NOT an internal 'notification' (which would be sent via the 'Log note' tab).
